scripts.db:test:setup: mysql -u root -p -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS luxury_estate_test CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;" && DATABASE_URL=$TEST_DATABASE_URL npx prisma db push --force-reset
scripts.db:sqlite:generate: node scripts/generate-sqlite-schema.js && cross-env PRISMA_SCHEMA=prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma npx prisma generate
scripts.db:sqlite:push: cross-env PRISMA_SCHEMA=prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma DATABASE_URL="file:./prisma/test.db" npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.test:sqlite: npm run db:sqlite:generate && npm run db:sqlite:push && cross-env TEST_TARGET=sqlite jest --runInBand
scripts.test:mysql: npx prisma generate && cross-env TEST_TARGET=mysql jest --runInBand
